name: American Picture House Corp
summary: American Picture House Corp (APHP) is a film and limited series development, production, and distribution company. The company focuses on creating and monetizing filmed entertainment content through licensing and distribution agreements. It pursues revenue opportunities through film and limited series projects, working with third-party partners in talent, production, and distribution arrangements.
